message: Command `find / -type f -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null | head -100 | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf "{}" 2>/dev/null | head -20' 2>/dev/null | grep -i "vul\|repo" | head -20` executed with exit code 0.
